hardware frontier

I verify DRAM, model memory architectures, and write about the semiconductor world. Currently transitioning into performance architecture.

◎ Transition in progress
DV Engineer → Performance Architect · Q1–Q4 2026
Now

Working through Modern C++ and JEDEC DRAM state machines as part of a structured 4-quarter architect transition plan. Building a JEDEC-compliant DRAM Bank state machine from scratch and documenting the journey here. Also exploring open source memory simulators to contribute to.

Writing
Mar 10, 2026 career
Kicking off the Performance Architect Transition
Documenting the official shift from DRAM DV to System-Level Performance Architect. The focus is moving entirely away from low-level RTL verification and UVM/SV toward high-level...
